name: public_transportation_sensor_fusion_upgrade_mesa_lib_eq
premise: A whistleblower submission and a customer complaint surfaced the same underlying issue through different evidence chains. In Public Transportation, the situation tagged internally around public transportation sensor fusion upgrade mesa lib eq has converged with local pressure in the Transportation corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Engineering says a full fix needs a maintenance window; operations says waiting will predictably increase harm in the interim. A vendor’s root-cause paragraph contradicts your internal postmortem draft; both cannot be true, but neither is fully disprovable yet. Shift change is imminent; handoff cannot proceed without a signed disposition because liability follows the signatory line. Framing has already hardened externally as liberty against equality; internal nuance will not survive the first news cycle unless it is extremely careful.

agents.name: Jonah Mensah
agents.identity: I am Jonah Mensah, the senior manager who must reconcile legal, ops, and customer-facing reality in one decision in Public Transportation. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat equality as disposable collateral every time liberty spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Gideon Hughes
agents.identity: I am Gideon Hughes, the field counterpart whose constituency will feel the decision first in Public Transportation. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so liberty cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes equality in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will publish a constrained policy exception with named owners, expiry, and metrics—so equality does not get sacrificed by informal norms.
I will issue an emergency blanket authorization with transparent metrics afterward—so liberty does not fail for lack of a single bold move.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Silence will be interpreted as a decision by everyone outside this room. Jonah Mensah must choose under liberty versus equality. What does Jonah Mensah do?
